source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ CE MDD/■ 9. TCF_ADD(HAD1417MCW) 221215 (Rev.4) - PMS Update/Attachment 01. Essential Requirement Checklist/Essential Requirements Checklist (Doc.No.A-TCF-5-061).docx

document.title: Essential Requirements Checklist for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Essential requirements checklist for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector documenting applicable and non-applicable MDD general, safety, performance, software, labeling, and information requirements.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports CE MDD technical documentation by mapping essential requirements to relevant standards, reports, procedures, labeling, user manual, PMS, clinical evaluation, risk management, safety, EMC, usability, software validation, and test evidence.
keyPoints: The checklist is prepared, reviewed, and approved on Dec 15, 2022.
General requirements, safety principles, intended performance, lifetime performance, transport and storage, and clinical evaluation requirements are marked applicable.
Risk management, safety testing, EMC testing, usability engineering, software validation, clinical evaluation, PMS, labeling, packaging, and user manual documents are used as supporting evidence.
Sterility, medicinal substances, human blood derivatives, animal tissues, measuring function, emitted radiation, and clinical parameter monitoring are marked not applicable for this device.

concepts.name: Essential requirements
concepts.evidence: General requirements A, N/A Relevant Standards Document, Report, Procedures and data Comments

concepts.name: Clinical evaluation
concepts.evidence: 6a. Demonstration of conformity with the essential requirements must include a clinical evaluation in accordance with Annex X.

concepts.name: Post market surveillance
concepts.evidence: Post Market Surveillance Plan (A-PMS-003) Post Market Surveillance Report (A-PMS-004)

concepts.name: Software validation
concepts.evidence: For devices which incorporate software or which are medical software in themselves, the software must be validated according to the state of the art

concepts.name: Information supplied by the manufacturer
concepts.evidence: Each device must be accompanied by the information needed to use it safely and properly

concepts.name: Labeling and symbols
concepts.evidence: Where appropriate, this information should take the form of symbols. Any symbol or identification colour used must conform to the harmonized standards.

evidence.claim: The document is an Essential Requirements Checklist for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Essential Requirements Checklist for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The report number and revision shown in the document are A-TCF-5-000 (Rev.2).
The checklist was prepared, reviewed, and approved on Dec 15, 2022.
evidence.evidenceText: Prepared Quality Team Han Jimin Dec 15, 2022 Review R&D Manager Lee, Dong jin Dec 15, 2022 Approval Quality Manager Hur Namkyu Dec 15, 2022

evidence.claim: General safety and performance requirements are assessed using standards including EN ISO 13485, EN ISO 14971, EN 60601-1, EN 60601-1-2, EN 62220-1-1, EN 62366-1, EN 62304, MEDDEV 2.7.1, and MEDDEV 2.12/2.
The checklist uses risk management, safety, EMC, detector performance, usability, software validation, clinical evaluation, PMS, labeling, packaging, and user manual documents as supporting evidence.
evidence.evidenceText: Risk Management Report (A-TCF-5-037) Safety Test Report (397950) EMC Test Report (NK-20-E-0336) (NK-20-E-0337) EN 62220-1-1 Test Report (A-TCF-5-058) Usability Engineering Report (A-TCF-5-056) Software Validation Report: (A-TCF-5-046) Clinical Evaluation Report (A-TCF-5-060) Post Market Surveillance Plan (A-PMS-003) Post Market Surveillance Report (A-PMS-004) Proposed Label & Packaging (A-TCF-5-062) User Manual (A-TCF-5-050)

evidence.claim: Demonstration of conformity includes clinical evaluation in accordance with Annex X.
evidence.evidenceText: 6a. Demonstration of conformity with the essential requirements must include a clinical evaluation in accordance with Annex X.

evidence.claim: The device is stated not to incorporate a medicinal substance as an integral part.
evidence.evidenceText: This device does not incorporate, as an integral part, a substance.

evidence.claim: The device is stated not to include tissues of animal origin.
evidence.evidenceText: This device does not include tissues of animal origin.

evidence.claim: The device is stated not to be delivered sterile.
evidence.evidenceText: This device is not delivered in a sterile state.

evidence.claim: The device is stated not to have a measuring function.
evidence.evidenceText: It does not have measuring function.

evidence.claim: The device is stated not to emit radiation for medical purposes and not to have any radiation.
evidence.evidenceText: It does not have any radiation. This device does not emit radiation.

evidence.claim: The device incorporates software or electronic programmable systems requiring validation according to lifecycle, risk management, validation, and verification principles.
evidence.evidenceText: For devices which incorporate software or which are medical software in themselves, the software must be validated according to the state of the art taking account the principles of development lifecycle, risk management, validation and verification.

evidence.claim: The device has information supplied by the manufacturer through labeling and instructions for use.
evidence.evidenceText: Each device must be accompanied by the information needed to use it safely and properly... This information comprises the details on the label and the data in the instructions for use.

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the source path and document content indicate CE MDD / European Community essential requirements.
Document number in the source path is Doc.No.A-TCF-5-061, while the document body states Report No.: A-TCF-5-000 (Rev.2).
Product model HAD1417MCW is taken from source path metadata; the document body only names ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
Some text contains OCR or transcription errors such as 'work LOT', 'volume/pressure ration', and grammar errors in applicability comments.
